title: Onigashima Moves Toward the Climax
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Kozuki Alliance, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Ulti, Unknown person #12 as The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.
scene: The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I noticed a difference in aroma between the bowls you served up.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The one you gave usohachi was Ni-hachi soba, which is 80 percent buckwheat flour.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I'm willing to bet your lesser noodles have only 60...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: No...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Less than 50 percent buckwheat in them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What the...?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He figured all that out without even eating 'em?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can't say I understand what you're talking about, good sir.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: In fact...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...you've served up a rather horrible insult upon our humble restaurant.

dialogue.speaker: Kozuki Alliance
dialogue.text: I'm afraid I must demand recompense.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Recom- Pense?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Hence- forth...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...you are never to set foot in the flower capital again.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: See, I've got a Yakuza family backing me. They ain't nice.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: They catch sight of you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ....and the next anybody'll see you is when they find you floating in the river!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Come now. No need to get vicious.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: See, I happen to know a thing or two about cooking.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: And?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: How about we have a little contest?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Personally, I don't think you deserve to run a restaurant.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I can beat you at soba, you'll give me your spot.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But if you win, I'll do as you say...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...and leave the capital forever.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ha ha ha Ha! What's he goin' on about?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Didja hear this guy, big bro?! he's crazy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WaH HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Heh. All right.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll accept your challenge... If you indeed have the bravery to see it through.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I've made up my mind, usohachi.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'm opening a SOBA STALL!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I'll run those cocky, corrupt Soba Pedlers out of town!

dialogue.speaker: Ulti
dialogue.text: With my ultimate SOBA dish...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: So yeah. To do that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I'm going to need you to build me a food cart.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know you're busy, but can you do it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Gotcha. Hang on...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: KLink Klank Klunk

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: there. Done.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Well, that was fast.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I assume you'll start practicing your recipe next?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Yep.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: usohachi should be getting back with the ingredients any minute...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hey, guys! We got a prob- Lem!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The other guys did WHAT?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah. They monopolized all the best-quality buckwheat flour!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Apparently, Haraguroya's owner is connected to somebody at Paradise Farm.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They've got a deal that gives him prefer- initial treat-ment.

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 49 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
